title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at LG Soft India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at LG Soft India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? LG Soft India Holdings Services in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About LG Soft India Holdings Services:
LG Soft India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LG Soft India Holdings Services!
